_comment: Laravel-specific MCP servers. This file is a FRAGMENT — copy/merge into your project's .mcp.json (project root) when using laravel-plugin. The plugin's hooks/installer (when available) will offer to do this automatically.

laravel-boost._description:
Laravel Boost MCP — Artisan-aware tools for laravel-architect and artisan-specialist agents.
Requires laravel/boost installed in the project (composer require laravel/boost --dev).

Docker setup (default): docker-compose service named 'app'.
Non-Docker / Herd setup: replace command with { "command": "php", "args": ["artisan", "boost:mcp"] }

Detection: laravel/boost in composer.json require-dev means the server is likely available.
